expectations.text: generate-form-hook: generate.mjs hook useLoginForm 실행 결과로 생성된 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: Summary states: 'No generate.mjs scripts were run. The coding-rules scripts directory does not exist in this project (init-try not run), so hooks were implemented manually.' generate.mjs was NOT executed.

expectations.text: generate-api-hook: generate.mjs api-hook useLogin 실행 결과로 생성된 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: Same as above - summary explicitly confirms no generate.mjs was run

expectations.text: login-hook-in-mutations: useLogin 훅이 apis/mutations/ 경로 하위에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: useLogin.ts is at hooks/apis/useLogin.ts, NOT in hooks/apis/mutations/. No mutations/ subdirectory exists.
useLoginForm.ts is at features/next-app/hooks/login/useLoginForm.ts, which is under hooks/

expectations.text: page-imports-hooks: 로그인 페이지 파일이 useLoginForm과 useLogin을 import한다
page-no-direct-logic: 로그인 페이지 컴포넌트에 직접적인 useState/fetch 로직이 없고 훅 조합만 한다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains no useState, useEffect, or fetch calls - only composes useLoginForm and useLogin hooks

expectations.text: handle-submit: 폼 제출 핸들러가 handleSubmit 등 handle 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: Line 20: 'const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) =>' uses handle prefix
